name: openlinker
description: Open-source, modular, API-first e-commerce orchestration platform

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @openlinker/shared build && pnpm --filter @openlinker/core build && pnpm --filter @openlinker/integrations-prestashop build && pnpm --filter @openlinker/api build
scripts.build:prestashop: pnpm --filter @openlinker/shared build && pnpm --filter @openlinker/core build && pnpm install && pnpm --filter @openlinker/integrations-prestashop build
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @openlinker/shared build && pnpm --filter @openlinker/core build && pnpm --filter @openlinker/integrations-prestashop build && pnpm -r type-check
scripts.dev:stack:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis mysql prestashop
